name: author retry nudge repairs continuation contract

source.purpose: Regression coverage for Ch2+ Author setup attempts that omit continuation_moves, emit an incomplete continuation_dramatic_turn, or fail to assign leverage procedure residue to a named pressure owner.

errors: transition_seed.procedure_residue route gate marked leverage but continuation_dramatic_turn.procedure_budget does not assign it to a pressure owner
containsAll: Chapter 2+ requires complete continuation_moves and continuation_dramatic_turn blocks
Do not leave owner_using_it as "none", a timer, a readout, a gate, or an abstract system

retryableErrors: transition_seed.procedure_residue route gate marked leverage but continuation_dramatic_turn.procedure_budget does not assign it to a pressure owner
